sentences.translation: Škola je pokrenula kampanju za podsticanje čitanja.
sentences.translationEn: The school launched a campaign to encourage reading.

sentences.arabic: يَقْرَأُ كُلُّ طَالِبٍ كِتَابًا وَاحِدًا كُلَّ أُسْبُوعٍ.
sentences.translation: Svaki učenik čita jednu knjigu sedmično.
sentences.translationEn: Every student reads one book per week.

sentences.arabic: يَتَحَدَّثُ الطُّلَّابُ عَنِ الْكِتَابِ أَمَامَ زُمَلَائِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Učenici govore o knjizi pred svojim drugarima.
sentences.translationEn: The students talk about the book in front of their classmates.

sentences.arabic: يَنَالُ أَكْثَرُ قَارِئٍ جَائِزَةً فِي نِهَايَةِ الشَّهْرِ.
sentences.translation: Najaktivniji čitalac dobija nagradu na kraju mjeseca.
sentences.translationEn: The most avid reader receives a prize at the end of the month.
